data.title: Restore search bar on Publications page (keep tags hidden)

data.body: Follow-up to FRAC-169: re-mount the ArchiveSearch input on src/pages/LabPage.tsx. Keep tag chips + tag filter OFF. Components on disk (ArchiveSearch.tsx, use-archive-filter.ts) — just render the search without the tag UI, or add a 'tags: false' prop to ArchiveToolbar.
